commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the pots, and the shovels, and the basins: and all these vessels, which Hiram made for king Solomon for the house of the LORD, were of bright bronze. Fine brass (aurichalco. ) Some pretended that gold was mixed with this sort of brass. But Pliny ( xxxiv. ) informs us that it came out of the mines, without dross. Hebrew, "polished (or refined) brass. "(Calmet) It might resemble the Corinthian brass. (Menochius).
